name: TransMedics Group, Inc.
business: TransMedics develops the Organ Care System (OCS), a portable warm perfusion platform for heart, lung, and liver transplantation, and offers the National OCS Program (NOP) for outsourced organ procurement, perfusion management, and transplant logistics. The company sells OCS disposable sets, consoles, and NOP services to transplant centers and organ procurement organizations in the United States, Europe, and Asia-Pacific.
sellsTo: Transplant centers in the United States
Transplant centers in Europe and Asia-Pacific

exposures.sentence: We are a medical technology company transforming organ transplant therapy for end-stage organ failure patients across multiple disease states.

We have also developed our NOP, an innovative turnkey solution to provide outsourced organ procurement, OCS perfusion management and transplant logistics services, to provide transplant programs in the United States with a more efficient process to procure donor organs with the OCS.

catalysts.sentence: The OCS Heart trial, referred to as the ENHANCE Heart trial, was initiated in the fourth quarter of 2025

catalysts.event: Initiation of OCS Lung DENOVO trial
catalysts.sentence: In August 2025 and January 2026, we received FDA approval under Investigational Device Exemptions, or IDEs, to initiate multi-part, prospective clinical trials for next-generation versions of our OCS Heart and OCS Lung systems, respectively.

catalysts.event: Transition to new corporate headquarters in Somerville, MA
catalysts.sentence: We expect to transition certain of our operations to the Somerville premises on or before January 1, 2028, with the goal of ultimately replacing our existing headquarters in Andover, Massachusetts.
